protocolPermissions.description: Identify the reader, author, or admin without passwords.
Sign authenticated API requests to the PaperTrade server.
Receive PaperTrade author payouts using BRC29 payment remittance.
Label PaperTrade page payments, funding payments, and author payouts.
Resolve author identity keys into user-friendly identity cards.

spendingAuthorization.description: Authorize small per-page reading payments and optional server funding payments.

basketAccess.description: Track incoming PaperTrade author payout transactions.
